functions.name: get_all_kit_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_all_kit_ecommerce()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
    select json_agg(x) from (
                                select * from products.v_kit_extended WHERE id in (SELECT id from products.kit WHERE ecommerce = true)
                            ) x;

    $function$

functions.name: get_kit_by_id_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_kit_by_id_ecommerce(search_kit bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisco il primo oggetto
select json_agg(x) -> 0
from (select kit.*, k.billing_period
      from products.v_kit_extended kit join products.kit k using (id)
      where kit.id = search_kit and k.ecommerce = true) x;

$function$

functions.name: get_kit_filtered_ecommerce
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_kit_filtered_ecommerce(p_category_id integer, p_customer_group_id integer)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
-- restituisce la lista di tutti i kit filtrati per categoria
    select json_agg(x) from (
        select * from products.v_kit_extended
        where id in (select id from products.kit join products.kit_customer_group kcg on kit.id = kcg.kit_id
                     where (p_category_id is null or kit.category_id = p_category_id) and
                         ( p_customer_group_id is null or kcg.group_id = p_customer_group_id) and kit.ecommerce = true
        )
    ) x;

    $function$

functions.name: get_product_custom_fields
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_product_custom_fields(search_code character varying)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
    -- restituisce la lista dei campi custom
    select json_agg(x) from (
                                select key_name, value from products.product_custom_value
                                where product_code = search_code
                            ) x;

    $function$

functions.name: set_selectable_on_create
